purpose: Final whole-project profile coverage repair narrows endpoints and fixes stack-based back navigation evidence.

set.targetBehavior: `bootstrap_page.cj::buildProfileRoute` wires `renderProfileRoute` with stack-based back navigation through `navigateBack()`, placeholder toast actions for edit and section taps, and `performLogout()` to clear route-local state and navigate back to onboarding after session logout.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `Profile.kt` owns the back icon, edit/action-card click surfaces, and logout navigation callback.

Manual target review confirmed `bootstrap_page.cj::buildProfileRoute`, `profile_page.cj::renderProfileRoute`, and `app_router.cj::resolveProfileBackRoute` preserve the source command surface while making back navigation follow the real route stack instead of a fabricated fixed destination.

Manual phase-06 test reproduction confirmed the updated target tests still pass after the stack-based back navigation repair.

set.targetBehavior: `bootstrap_page.cj` owns the route-local profile callbacks and passes them into `renderProfileRoute`, while `profile_store.cj` centralizes the static identity and placeholder-action message so the translated profile route updates immediately for logout and placeholder taps without inventing new backend state. Back navigation now follows the route stack through `resolveProfileBackRoute` and `navigateBack()` instead of a fixed destination.
